ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position played by the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2018-19) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-game combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "fgm" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player */,
  "fg_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_pm" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player */,
  "three_pa" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted by the player */,
  "three_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "ftm" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matchups" (
  "matchup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-opponent combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player against the opponent */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Points allowed by the player to the opponent */,
  "rebounds_allowed" INTEGER /* Rebounds allowed by the player to the opponent */,
  "assists_allowed" INTEGER /* Assists allowed by the player to the opponent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("matchup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, front office staff) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle, concussion) */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
